titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muhammad Ibn Sinan

text: و ما كان فيه عن محمّد بن سنان فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عمّه محمّد بن أبي القاسم، عن محمّد بن عليّ الكوفيّ، عن محمّد بن سنان. و رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن محمّد بن سنان‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: And whatever is narrated from Muhammad ibn Sinan, I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from his uncle Muhammad ibn Abi Al-Qasim, from Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Kufi, from Muhammad ibn Sinan. And I have also narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father, from Muhammad ibn Sinan.
